channel.title: Argentine on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in Argentine on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: R40
item.description: Summary Looking on Yelp, we found that this new Argentine restaurant opened up on Vernon Blvd pretty recently in Long Island City. The menu has a lot of interesting and affordable meat dishes. It's great that this street is opening a lot of cool restaurants of various cuisines. It appears they have a patio in the back that would be pretty awesome once the weather warms up. I can imagine this place being a super popular hot spot in the foreseeable future.
